query:
SELECT 
  w.name,
  a.weekStartDate,
  a.weekEndDate,
  a.timeBlocks,
  a.confirmedAt
FROM workers w
JOIN availability a ON w.id = a.workerId
WHERE w.name LIKE '%伊娜%'
AND a.weekStartDate >= '2026-02-09'
AND a.weekStartDate < '2026-02-16';
